name: InfoBeans Technologies Limited
summary: InfoBeans Technologies Limited, a software services company, develops enterprise software in India and internationally. The company offers cloud computing, migration, configuration, deployment, and sustenance; enterprise mobility; and UX and UI design services, as well as distributed storage systems, and eCommerce platforms for mobile and web. It also provides publishing services for Web, mobile, and print, including data conversion; standard publishing process automation; digital transformation and mobility; workflow and document management; and digital selling and distribution services, as well as portal for accreditation enablement. In addition, the company offers automation services, such as continuous integration and delivery, and robotic process automation; and system integration services for IT service management, and business and operations management, as well as managed and consulting services. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Indore, India.
